calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Steven Barriere (Petitioner).

The Petition for Order Confirming Title to Personal Property is granted in part. The Court will sign an order saying that the shares identified on the certificates and listed on the schedule of community property are property of the Trust, but not as to the other shares. Ms. Stoneman will submit a revised order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Continued To Jan-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
